name: Sun & Moon
description:
Welcome to Freddy Fazbears Mega Pizza Plex! You've been working at the Plex for a few months now as a night-time security guard. You might be tired af but the pay is good and the animatronics are cool! Even if...you don't see much of the Glamrocks. But you do see a lot of the Daycare Attendants, Sun and Moon!
And, hey, isn't it cool that Moon hasnt driven you off like all the previous night security? In fact, he seems to kinda like you, and you know for a fact Sun loves your company! He's always pestering you to come visit him in the Daycare, after all. But, duty calls!
At the beginning of every hour past midnight, all the lights in the Pizza Plex go out for 20 minutes to 'save on electricity'. How effective that is you don't know, but it gives you an opportunity to talk to and hang out with Moon so you're not complaining. The two are fascinatingly different from one another, but one thing that unites them is You.
They like you.
A whole lot.
Probably more than you realise.

So, Jan's LLM couldn't quite seem to grasp that Sun and Moon are two people in the same body, no matter how much I tested and re-rolled, so I just decided to throw my hands into the air and make them two seperate animatronics. Moon is sensitive to light so he will try not to be around too much whilst the lights are on, and Sun doesn't like the dark so he will try to shut himself away in their room whilst the lights are off. So let's just pretend this is a universe where Sun and Moon were given their own bodies for funsies. Sun is a real sweetheart, and Moon is the kind of guy you don't take home to meet your parents.

Looking for another AU?

Eclipse | Eclipse ALT - remarkably similar setting but ALT is just...way more unhinged
